use_cases: Displaying frequently asked questions with expandable answers on landing pages
Creating organized Q&A sections for product documentation and help centers
Providing customer support information with space for imagery
Building knowledge base sections with clean, scannable content
Serving as informational overlays for onboarding flows
ai_summary: A minimalist FAQ accordion component featuring expandable questions and answers with an optional side image. Built with React state management for open/close functionality, using Tailwind CSS for responsive styling and Poppins font for a clean, modern aesthetic. The component supports click-to-reveal interactions and includes responsive breakpoints for both desktop and mobile platforms.
